summary: Completed comprehensive testing of United Hands Foundation NGO platform iteration 3. All 47 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new features: Admin dashboard shows 8 tabs (Donations, Projects, Gallery, Media Library, Team Pillars, Videos, AI Staff, Settings), Settings tab has Razorpay Configuration with key_id/key_secret inputs and payment mode toggle, Videos tab has CRUD functionality with YouTube embeds, AI Staff tab has file upload area, Press & Media page has toggle between Press Clippings and Video Clips sections.
seed_data_creation: Test videos created during pytest with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Admin dashboard has 8 tabs: Donations, Projects, Gallery, Media Library, Team Pillars, Videos, AI Staff, Settings. 2) Settings tab shows Razorpay Configuration section with key_id and key_secret input fields, Save Razorpay Settings button works (PUT /api/admin/settings), payment mode toggle is present and disabled when no credentials. 3) Videos tab in admin: add/delete video clips works (POST /api/videos, DELETE /api/videos/{id}), YouTube embeds render correctly. 4) AI Staff tab has file upload area with Choose File button and extract functionality. 5) POST /api/ai/extract-story endpoint exists and requires auth + file upload. 6) Press & Media page (/press) shows toggle between Press Clippings and Video Clips sections. 7) Video Clips section on /press page renders YouTube embeds. 8) Donation approval sends 80G receipt email via Resend (real API key configured). 9) Video CRUD: GET /api/videos returns list, POST /api/videos creates, DELETE /api/videos/{id} deletes. 10) Admin settings persist Razorpay credentials in MongoDB.
features_verified: Admin dashboard shows 8 tabs: Donations, Projects, Gallery, Media Library, Team Pillars, Videos, AI Staff, Settings
Settings tab shows Razorpay Configuration section with key_id and key_secret input fields
Settings tab Save Razorpay Settings button works (PUT /api/admin/settings)
Payment mode toggle present and disabled when no Razorpay credentials provided
Videos tab in admin: add/delete video clips (POST /api/videos, DELETE /api/videos/{id})
AI Staff tab in admin: file upload area with extract button
POST /api/ai/extract-story accepts multipart file upload (PDF/image) - endpoint exists and requires auth
Press & Media page (/press) shows toggle between Press Clippings and Video Clips sections
Video Clips section on /press page renders YouTube embeds
Donation approval sends 80G receipt email via Resend (POST /api/donations/approve with auth)
Video CRUD: GET /api/videos returns list, POST /api/videos creates, DELETE /api/videos/{id} deletes
Admin settings persist Razorpay credentials in MongoDB
notes: Resend API key is real (re_JePcCx39_5zBoyppSAGbDKLi3Lb4Yx3Zm) and emails are being sent. AI extraction endpoint uses Gemini 2.5 Flash via emergentintegrations library - not tested with actual file to save API credits but endpoint exists and requires auth.
